query: 日本各地有什么特色的发酵食品文化？
reasoning: Query asks specifically about fermented food cultures (発酵食品文化) across Japan. Tool was called without any keyword filter (e.g. 発酵, 味噌, 醤油, 漬物), so the 500 returned items are generic MAFF GI records — Aomori cassis, Tajima beef, Yubari melon, Yame gyokuro, Edosaki pumpkin — none of which are fermented foods. Rule B applied: single root cause (missing keyword arg) drives intent and usefulness to 2; specificity drops by 1. Language constraint (zh) is correctly honoured. Travel feasibility N/A, scored 5.
missing_data: Fermented food records — miso, soy sauce (shoyu GI entries), sake, mirin, tsukemono, katsuobushi, natto, nukazuke — none surfaced. A keyword='発酵' or category filter would retrieve relevant MAFF GI and 郷土料理 fermented entries.
improvement_hint: Add a keyword argument (e.g. keyword='発酵') when the query intent targets a specific food category. Alternatively, implement intent-based auto-filtering in get_local_food so that fermented-food queries automatically narrow to relevant categories before truncating at 500.
